scripts.dev:all: docker compose up -d && pnpm -F '@jessy/domain' run build && pnpm -F '@jessy/application' run build && pnpm -F '@jessy/infrastructure' run build && pnpm -F server run dev & pnpm -F mobile run web
scripts.build: pnpm -F '@jessy/domain' run build && pnpm -F '@jessy/application' run build && pnpm -F '@jessy/infrastructure' run build
